setting.help: Allows project users to run “Sync folder from Graph” when drive and item ids are set.
Azure AD / Entra ID tenant (directory) ID.
App registration client id with Sites.Read.All / Files.Read.All (or narrower) as required.
From Certificates & secrets in the app registration. Stored in system parameters; keep rotation discipline.
Index only keeps names and deep links in Odoo; fetching stores PDF binaries as project attachments (deduplicated by Graph item id).
Hard limit per file when fetch mode is enabled.
Suggested job folder names use: prefix + Codice Commessa + separator + name slug (see project Document hub).
Single character between job code and project name slug.
Limits the project-name portion for Microsoft 365 path length.
Where SBU staff create project folders (team site or document library).
Internal rules: custodian role, M365 group, who may rename or archive folders.

field.name: sbu_onedrive_ownership_policy
field.placeholder: e.g. Folders owned by Engineering-Projects M365 group; PM sets custodian on each job.

setting.help: When to use Odoo tasks vs Planner; shared channel naming; deep links only (no duplicate task sync).

field.name: sbu_m365_collaboration_policy
field.placeholder: e.g. Execution in Planner; Odoo task optional with link to Planner item; Teams shared channel per job.

setting.help: Placeholder for a future Qonto bridge.
Middleware root URL for JSON imports (module sbu_logikal). Example: https://bridge.example.com
